description_long: This is a bronze-colored Corinthian-style helmet with a prominent crest running from front to back, featuring alternating blue and white bristles. The helmet's surface is adorned with intricate engraved patterns along the lower rim and cheek guards, giving it an ornate and historical appearance. The face opening is T-shaped, providing visibility and protection, with pronounced cheek plates and a nose guard. The crest is mounted on a central ridge, and the bristles fan out widely at the top, adding both height and visual impact. The metal surface appears aged and slightly weathered, with a matte finish and some visible dents or marks. The interior is hollow, designed to fit over a human head, and there are no visible modern attachments or fastenings.
description: An ornate bronze Corinthian helmet with a blue and white bristled crest, engraved patterns, and a T-shaped face opening. The helmet has a weathered, historical look with detailed metalwork.
description_view_0: Front-top view showing the central ridge and the blue and white crest running from front to back, with engraved cheek guards visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full fan of the blue and white crest and the rounded, engraved lower rim of the helmet.
description_view_2: Side-top view displaying the profile of the helmet, the engraved cheek guard, and the thickness of the crest.
description_view_3: Direct front view showing the T-shaped face opening, nose guard, and symmetrical cheek plates, with the crest fanning out above.
attribute_graphic_design: Engraved ornamental patterns along the lower rim and cheek guards; blue and white striped crest.
